description: A comprehensive JSON schema defining the operational state, capabilities, and configuration of the Connect AI agent.

environment.file_system_access: Direct, offline access to the local file system via agent actions.
environment.context_source: Local workspace files and optional GitHub knowledge base.

agent_capabilities.description: Generates new files and directories in the workspace.
Finds and replaces specific code in existing files.
Reads the content of any file in the workspace to understand context.
Lists contents of a specific subdirectory.
Executes CLI commands (e.g., npm install, node).
Queries the personal knowledge base (Second Brain) from a linked repository.
